TV Series.title: Holmes on Homes: Building a Legacy
TV Series.overview: Mike Holmes, along with his children Michael and Sherry, helps deserving homeowners fix disastrous renovations and build healthier, functional homes.

TV Series.title: Somewhat Familiar
TV Series.overview: Pedro Andrade travels the world uncovering how different cultures experience fatherhood and family diversity.

TV Series.title: Greatest Mysteries Ever
TV Series.overview: From ancient tombs and the fall of nations to biblical legends and unexplained phenomena, uncover the truth behind history's greatest mysteries.

TV Series.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
TV Series.overview: Now single, 90 Day Fiance favorites are looking to find love again while attempting to let go of baggage from their past.

TV Series.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
TV Series.overview: Over five intense days, 120 Hours Behind Bars delivers an unfiltered look inside America's toughest jails -- where officers are outnumbered, cellblocks are overcrowded, and violence erupts without warning.

TV Series.title: Banksters
TV Series.overview: When 20-something Yusuf is arrested for a series of bank heists, his sister attempts to return the money and identify who betrayed him.

TV Series.title: Asia
TV Series.overview: Sir David Attenborough presents Asia, a seven-part series covering the length and breadth of our planet's largest and richest continent, revealing its most remarkable landscapes and animals, and stories featuring dramatic, previously unseen behavior.

Movies.title: The Cranes Are Flying
Movies.overview: This landmark film by the virtuosic Mikhail Kalatozov was heralded as a revelation in the post-Stalin Soviet Union and the international cinema community alike. It tells the story of Veronica (Tatiana Samoilova) and Boris (Alexei Batalov), a couple who are blissfully in love until World War II tears them apart. With Boris at the front, Veronica must try to ward off spiritual numbness and defend herself from the increasingly forceful advances of her beau’s draft-dodging cousin. Winner of the Palme d’Or at the 1958 Cannes Film Festival, THE CRANES ARE FLYING is a superbly crafted drama with impassioned performances and viscerally emotional, gravity-defying cinematography by Kalatozov’s regular collaborator Sergei Urusevsky.

Movies.title: That Certain Woman
Movies.overview: When Mary Connell - the innocent young wife of a notorious gangster - suddenly becomes a young widow, she tries to improve herself but finds her past difficult to escape.

Movies.title: Arrow In The Dust
Movies.overview: A deserter takes on his dead captain's identity to save a wagon train.

Movies.title: Call Me by Your Name
Movies.overview: Set in the early 1980s, a 17-year-old boy falls in love with a young doctoral student staying with his parents over the summer in the Italian Riviera.

Movies.title: A Stolen Life
Movies.overview: A twin takes her deceased sister's place as the wife of the man they both love.

Movies.title: Paddington 2
Movies.overview: Paddington must use his detective skills to catch a book thief in this fun-filled sequel.

Movies.title: Mr. Skeffington
Movies.overview: A flighty beauty marries a stockbroker for convenience and almost ruins both their lives.

Movies.title: The Fighting 69th
Movies.overview: A braggart soldier learns the true meaning of heroism when he joins World War I's all-Irish unit.

Movies.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
Movies.overview: When New York is put under siege by the mysterious company Oscorp, it is up to Spider-Man to save the city he swore to protect, as well as his loved ones.

Movies.title: Kid Galahad
Movies.overview: When a bellhop knocks out fighter Chuck McGraw, promoter Nick Donati realizes he's a potential champ.

Movies.title: Flamingo Road
Movies.overview: Academy Award winner Joan Crawford stars as a sideshow dancer whose passion and ambition tear apart a small Florida town that sits along Flamingo Road.

Movies.title: Memento
Movies.overview: His short-term memory gone, a man tattoos his body with clues on a mind-bending mission in reverse to piece together the puzzle of his wife’s murder.

Movies.title: The Woman on Pier 13
Movies.overview: Communists blackmail a San Francisco shipper (Robert Ryan) and recruit his wife's (Laraine Day) brother (John Agar) with a blonde.

Movies.title: Along the Great Divide
Movies.overview: For his first movie Western, Kirk Douglas rode in good company. Filmed in the rugged High Sierras and Mojave Desert, Along the Great Divide is a lean, bullet-hard sagebrush saga.

Movies.title: The Star
Movies.overview: Movie queen Margaret Elliot’s popularity and fortune have gone bad. But she’s sure she can jump-start her dimming career. “One good picture is all I need,” she says. As Margaret, Bette Davis got yet another good picture and earned her ninth Academy Award® nomination. Davis’ confident, perceptive performance lends absolute authenticity, as did a prop she provided. An Oscar® statuette – set noticeably on the car dashboard during Margaret’s drunken spin through Beverly Hills – was one of two Davis owned. Sterling Hayden and Natalie Wood costar in this gripping story that has “many moments of truth” (Leonard Maltin’s Movie Guide). The Star shines.

Movies.title: A Woman's Face
Movies.overview: Plastic surgery gives a scarred female criminal a new outlook on life.

Movies.title: When Ladies Meet
Movies.overview: A female novelist doesn't realize her new friend is the wife whose husband she's trying to steal.

Movies.title: In This Our Life
Movies.overview: Spoiled heiress Stanley Timerlake seduces and steals her sister's husband, driving him to alcoholism and suicide. Returning home, she kills a mother and daughter in a hit-and-run, then blames the crime on an innocent servant while feeling no remorse.

Movies.title: The Blair Witch Project
Movies.overview: Three film students enter the Maryland forest to film a documentary on the local Blair Witch legend, but are never heard from again. A year later their footage was found.

Movies.title: Susan and God
Movies.overview: Socialite Susan Trexel undergoes a religious transformation and takes on the task of spreading her newfound religion to her closest friends.

Movies.title: Robot Chicken: Self-Discovery Special
Movies.overview: Our hapless Robot Chicken Nerd seeks self-discovery America's way: Going on reality shows! Will he find a 90 Day Fiancé -- or end up Shark Week chum?

Movies.title: Badman's Country
Movies.overview: Lawman Pat Garrett is on the verge of retirement when a new challenge comes his way in the person of Butch Cassidy.

Movies.title: Blair Witch
Movies.overview: After discovering a video showing what he believes to be his vanished sister Heather, James and a group of friends head into the Black Hills Forest in Maryland, which many believe is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch.

Movies.title: The Old Maid
Movies.overview: An unmarried mother gives her illegitimate child to her cousin.

Movies.title: The Young Guns
Movies.overview: From a movie era that explored - in films like Rebel Without a Cause, Blackboard jungle and High School Confidential! - what the day‘s media called “juvenile deliquency".

Movies.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
Movies.overview: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains newfound, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

Movies.title: Dancing Lady
Movies.overview: Clark Gable, Joan Crawford, Franchot Tone, Fred Astaire and the Three Stooges star in this musical romantic comedy about two strong-willed men who will do anything to win the heart of a Dancing Lady. Down on her luck, Janie Barlow (Academy Award winner Crawford--The Women, Humoresque) resorts to dancing in a burlesque show where she is seen by--and instantly wins the heart of--slumming milliona...

Movies.title: Evan Almighty
Movies.overview: When God instructs him to build an ark, Evan's life goes from overnight success to almighty mess!

Movies.title: The Purchase Price
Movies.overview: This offbeat melodrama was directed by the iconoclastic William A. Wellman and stars Barbara Stanwyck as Joan Gordon, a hardboiled nightclub singer on the lam who becomes a farmer's mail-order bride. After Joan gets fed up being the kept woman of her married boss, bootlegger Ed Fields (Lyle Talbot), she flees New York City and ends up in North Dakota as the mail-order bride of wheat farmer Jim Gilson (George Brent). The film features one of the weirdest wedding ceremonies ever shot, and Stanwyck's rendition of "Take Me Away" marks the first time she sang on screen.

Movies.title: Special Agent
Movies.overview: A newspaperman working undercover for the Feds teams up with a pretty bookkeeper in over her head working for the mob.

Movies.title: The Pope's Exorcist
Movies.overview: Inspired by the actual files of Father Gabriele Amorth, Chief Exorcist of the Vatican (Academy Award®-winner Russell Crowe), The Pope's Exorcist follows Amorth as he investigates a young boy's terrifying possession and ends up uncovering a centuries-old conspiracy the Vatican has desperately tried to keep hidden.

Movies.title: Miss Pinkerton
Movies.overview: A private duty nurse gets herself mixed up in a murder investigation. Miss Adams has an unusual eye for detail, so when a police detective sends her undercover to solve a puzzling murder case, she unravels a complex plot, and risking her life.

Movies.title: Spider-Man 3
Movies.overview: The seemingly invincible Spider-Man (Tobey Maguire) goes up against an all-new crop of villains—including the shape-shifting Sandman. While his superpowers are altered by an alien organism, his alter ego, Peter Parker, deals with nemesis Eddie Brock.

Movies.title: Bride of Frankenstein
Movies.overview: Dr. Frankenstein creates a female mate for his monster.

Movies.title: The Final Destination
Movies.overview: Death returns to claim the survivors of a massive speedway tragedy in this fourth installment in the 'Final Destination' series.

Movies.title: Winter Meeting
Movies.overview: A repressed poetess and an embittered war hero help each other cope with their problems.

Movies.title: The Damned Don't Cry
Movies.overview: Ethel Whitehead leaves her laborer husband behind to find a new, better life, and meets a rich gangster that leads her to a life of wealth and luxury. She engineers a rivalry, however, that sparks the ruin of everything she has fought to gain.

Movies.title: Chris Fleming: Live at The Palace
Movies.overview: From the Cadillac Palace Theatre in Chicago, comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special.

Movies.title: Final Destination 5
Movies.overview: Death returns to claim the lucky survivors of a deadly bridge collapse in this fifth frightening installment in the series.

Movies.title: The Greatest Showman
Movies.overview: A bold and original musical celebrating the birth of show business and dreams coming to life.
